match.userMessage:
Generate the visual prompt for the starting frame of this scene.

<CURRENT_SCENE>
{
  "sceneId": "scene-4",
  "sceneNumber": 4,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Cut to eye-level: Producer slaps paper on desk. Reporter snatches it -- shallow DOF on hands unfolding, revealing bold headline: \"REVOLUTIONARY SKIN DROP: EFFORTLESSLY COOL.\"",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Paper exchange at desk",
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM DESK",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Reveal the headline of the story"
  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

<SCENE_BEFORE>
(Context for position/lighting continuity only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene-3",
  "sceneNumber": 3,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS - HANDHELD DYNAMIC\n\nPRODUCER (40s, rumpled linen shirt, editorial energy) rushes in, clutching a single printed sheet. Close-up macro: fingers grip crisp paper edge, subtle texture crinkle under directional shadow. Footsteps punchy on polished floor.\n\n                    PRODUCER\n          (breathless, thrusting paper)\n        Story just broke. Viral sensation --\n        a breakthrough serum dropping tonight.\n        Fresh from the lab: #E8F4E8 glow in a drop.\n        We need this on air NOW.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "PRODUCER",
        "line": "Story just broke. Viral sensation -- a breakthrough serum dropping tonight. Fresh from the lab: #E8F4E8 glow in a drop. We need this on air NOW.",
        "tone": "breathless"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Producer rushes in with breaking news",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Introduce breaking story about the serum"
  }
}
</SCENE_BEFORE>

<SCENE_AFTER>
(Context for action setup only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene-5",
  "sceneNumber": 5,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM DESK - MOMENTS LATER - QUICK-CUT MONTAGE\n\nLocked shot: Reporter scans lede, eyes widen. Macro detail: glossy ink on paper shimmers under on-camera flash punch. Handheld lifestyle: she smooths sheet like daily ritual, fingers tracing words.\n\n                    REPORTER\n          (to producer, electric)\n        This is it. Tactile fresh. Sensory reset.\n        Live in three... two...\n\nProducer nods, backs away. Producer's hand lingers on chair -- real-life context, linen rumple.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "REPORTER",
        "line": "This is it. Tactile fresh. Sensory reset. Live in three... two...",
        "tone": "electric"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Reporter reacts to story and counts down",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM DESK - MOMENTS LATER",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Reporter gets excited and prepares to go live"
  }
}
</SCENE_AFTER>

<CHARACTER_BIBLE>
(Use ONLY for character names and costume/wardrobe. Do NOT describe physical appearance — the reference image handles identity.)
[

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

response.content: {"visual":{"fullPrompt":"Eye-level cinematic still in modern social-first product photography style with tactile editorial energy, shallow depth of field isolating the precise moment of exchange on a sleek newsroom desk during golden hour twilight, PRODUCER in rumpled linen shirt with hand tensed mid-slap driving a crisp printed sheet downward onto the glossy desk surface creating subtle crinkle texture and dynamic shadow play, REPORTER in pink blouse #D4536D with fingers extended snatching the paper mid-motion poised to unfold it revealing tactile details, airy modern newsroom interior with bright natural window light flooding through vast rain-streaked glass walls framing distant urban twilight glow and flickering billboards, scattered glowing terminals on adjacent desks emitting soft screen glows, polished floors reflecting warm golden highlights and clean directional shadows, high-key airy atmosphere with pops of contrast on hands and paper edges, warm golden hour sunlight casting immediate real-light feel with subtle rim lighting and on-camera flash punch for editorial vibrancy, handheld dynamic micro-movement implying urgent energy, macro texture emphasis on paper fibers and desk grain, anamorphic lens flares and shallow DOF blurring background into dreamy bokeh while foreground hands and sheet snap into razor-sharp focus, crisp whites #FFFFFF warm beiges #F0E6D3 pink #D4536D matte black #1A1A1A light green #E8F4E8 color palette, 16:9 composition.","negativePrompt":"blurry, deformed hands, extra limbs, deep depth of field, floating holograms, text overlays, subtitles, watermark, low resolution, overexposed, underexposed, heavy diffusion, lingering static poses","components":{"sceneDescription":"Producer slaps paper on desk as Reporter snatches and begins unfolding it, eye-level shallow DOF on hands and paper exchange.","subject":"Hands of PRODUCER in rumpled linen shirt and REPORTER in pink blouse #D4536D interacting with crisp printed sheet.","environment":"Modern newsroom desk area, airy interior with rain-streaked glass walls, glowing terminals, polished floors, golden hour twilight.","lighting":"Bright natural golden hour window light, high-key airy, clean directional shadows, screen glows, rim light on edges, subtle on-camera flash punch.","camera":"Eye-level handheld dynamic, shallow depth of field on hands/paper, macro texture detail, anamorphic flares.","composition":"Central focus on mid-motion paper exchange, blurred bokeh background, 16:9 cinematic framing.","style":"Modern social-first product photography, tactile editorial energy, real-life context, screenshot-worthy flat-lay vibe.","technical":"High resolution, sharp foreground details, true-to-life colors, 16:9 aspect ratio.","atmosphere":"Urgent dynamic sensory-sharp, fresh effortlessly cool editorial tension."}},"continuity":{"characterTags":["reporter","producer"],"environmentTag":"modern_newsroom_golden_twilight_rain","elementTags":[],"colorPalette":"crisp whites #FFFFFF, warm beiges #F0E6D3, pink #D4536D, matte black #1A1A1A, light green #E8F4E8","lightingSetup":"bright natural window light golden hour warmth, high-key airy, screen glows, clean directional shadows","styleTag":"modern
